name: Butternut Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the cubed squash in salted boiling water until tender.
2. Drain well.
3. Mash with butter.
4. Add brown sugar and mix well.
5. Add beaten egg, then evaporated milk.
6. Pour into a greased 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
7. Sprinkle toasted almonds on top.
8. Bake for 30 minutes at 325 degrees.
---
